query:
SELECT 
  external_id,
  section,
  bad_debt_amount,
  bad_debt_date,
  bad_debt_updated_by
FROM contracts
WHERE external_id LIKE '%CT0924-NRT001-00138-01%'
   OR external_id LIKE '%NRT001-00138%'
LIMIT 5;
